hooks.command: if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); else cmd=$(cat); fi; printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qE "git[[:space:]]+(commit|cm)([^[:alnum:]]|$)" && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Journal check — before this commit, follow the journal-anki skill (~/.claude/skills/journal-anki.md) and write the docs/journal entry for this phase. Approve only if it is written. Do NOT add to LEARNING_LOG.md.","additionalContext":"A git commit is about to run. Per CLAUDE.md, ensure the journal-anki entry for this phase exists under docs/journal/ before committing. If not yet written, stop and write it now."}}' || true
